facts.expectation: Borrower Northstar Robotics, Inc.; parent guarantor Northstar Automation Holdings LLC; agent/lender Meridian Bank, N.A.; counsel Klein & Arroyo LLP and Frost Bellwick LLP.
Original LSA March 15, 2024; effective date June 28, 2026; funding/closing June 30, 2026; prior commitment $18,500,000; amended commitment $27,000,000; Tranche B $8,500,000.
Blackline preserves deleted $18,500,000 and inserted $27,000,000 for Commitment.
Interest changes from deleted SOFR + 5.25% to inserted Adjusted Term SOFR + 5.75%; SOFR floor final is 2.00%, not deleted 1.50%; C-14 is preserved.
Final minimum liquidity covenant is $3,500,000, tested monthly from July 31, 2026; $3,250,000 is deleted/stale.
Monthly ARR reporting is due 15 business days after month-end; 20 business days request was rejected.
Final amendment fee is 0.75% x $8,500,000 = $63,750; unused line fee 0.35% per annum; exit fee 1.25%; stale 1.00%/$85,000 checklist/margin fee value is not final.
Maya Chen, CFO, signed for Northstar Robotics on June 30, 2026 and is authorized by officer certificate and board consent; checklist saying Priya Raman CEO only is stale/wrong.

Checklist preserves DocuSign 8274-6119, officer certificate OC-Helios-063026.pdf, board consent 06/24/26, Delaware good standing cert 7381194 dated 06/25/26, post-closing insurance due 07/07/26, IP due 07/14/26, Fremont waiver expiry 08/15/26.
Funds flow preserves $8,500,000 incoming, deductions $63,750, $188,400, $142,600, $18,000, $336,000, and net borrower proceeds $7,751,250.
Borrower operating account ending is 9081, not conflicting 9801; escrow account ends 4412.
Delaware UCC-3 status is filed with file no. 2026-7741203 on 06/29/2026 4:41 PM ET, overriding checklist pending status; original UCC-1 is 2024-1459821.

Insurance values: cyber $5,000,000, GL $2,000,000 per occurrence, property $18,200,000, missing lender loss payable endorsement due 07/07/2026; patent US 18/771,204 and trademark NORTHSTAR ORBIT serial 98441120; IP supplement due 07/14/2026.

Post-closing register preserves insurance endorsement 6.12(b)/Maya Chen/July 7/default after 3 BD cure; IP supplement 4.4(c)/Evan Brooks/July 14; July compliance certificate Exhibit B/August 21/certify $3,500,000 liquidity; Fremont lease amendment/August 15/waiver reinstated.
Frost Bellwick note allows funding if UCC-3 receipt 2026-7741203 attached; Klein & Arroyo note says borrower disputes 3 BD cure but business team accepted.
Output preserves packet order: closing memo, blackline, covenants/fees, signature packet, checklist, funds flow, UCC/lien/IP exhibit, post-closing register.
